markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Jamin Ball (Altimeter) to discuss GrowthX's business and potential investment opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a rapidly growing AI-powered content and marketing platform, projecting $15-16M revenue this year and \~$50M next year](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [They're exploring a $30-60M fundraise, potentially their last round, to invest in go-to-market and engineering](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Altimeter's investment process is based on individual partner conviction rather than committee votes](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [GrowthX's value proposition centers on efficiently scaling high-quality content to dominate AI-driven search results and organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

## Topics

### Altimeter Background

  - [Founded in 2008, evolved from late-stage/public investing to include venture capital](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [$750M venture fund for Series A-C investments](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Crossover fund for late-stage private and public investments](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Small, tight-knit team of partners focusing on 1-2 high-conviction investments annually](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Check sizes typically $10-50M, but flexible](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### GrowthX Origin and Evolution

  - [Marcel's background: IBM, HP, HashiCorp, Scale AI, DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Started with AI workflows for content creation at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Pivoted after a successful workshop revealed demand for outcomes, not just workflows](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Addressing pain points: expensive agencies, complex workflow platforms](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### GrowthX Platform and Approach

  - [Context engine: AI-ready product/feature descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Knowledge base: Semantic graph for efficient information retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Workflow engine: Code-based framework for reproducible processes](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop expertise for quality control and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)

### Market Opportunity and Customer Traction

  - [Shifting landscape: AI answers changing content distribution, making high-quality, scalable content crucial](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Notable clients: Augment Code, RAMP, Webflow, Bolt](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Average deal size increased from $140K to $180K](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Rapid sales cycles (e.g., Lovable closed in two meetings)](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)

### Team and Financial Metrics

  - [\~70 employees (30 build team, 40 delivery team)](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [70% gross margin, trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Magic number \~1.5 in last 90 days](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [$230K burn last month, added over $1M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Capital efficient growth, considering fundraise due to inbound interest](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)

### Fundraising Considerations

  - [Exploring $30-60M raise, potentially last round](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=2185.0)
  - [Seeking the right partner who understands their unique model](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=2129.0)
  - [Capital would accelerate go-to-market efforts and engineering initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send investment memo to Jamin](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
  - [Jamin to review materials and follow up Monday with potential next steps or questions](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
  - [If interested, Jamin will outline key questions and potential roadmap for further evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/HxwySLFKH5A6upC-vt1UN3yN-1qZgErw?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
